name: KLine_SetInitType
title: KLine_SetInitType
description: Restriction: It is only possible to change the init type between the pre-configured init type an no init pattern. It is not possible to change between fast init and 5 baud init or vice versa.
return: On success 0, otherwise a value less than 0.

description: Example shows a test case that makes sure that an ECU does not respond to a request after a S3 timeout.
